meta.title: Biological Age Calculator — How Old Is Your Body Really?
meta.description: Calculate your biological age based on resting heart rate, exercise, sleep, diet, and stress. PhenoAge-inspired algorithm with category breakdown and action plan.

biologicalAge.title: Biological Age Calculator
biologicalAge.description: Find out how old your body really is — based on lifestyle factors and health markers.
biologicalAge.rhrHint: Measure in the morning before getting up
biologicalAge.disclaimer: This estimate is for informational purposes only and is not medical advice. Biological age is influenced by many factors that no calculator can fully capture. Consult a healthcare professional for personal health guidance.
biologicalAge.blogLinkTitle: Biological Age Calculator — The Science Behind the Concept

actions.rhr: Aerobic training (swimming, cycling) consistently lowers resting heart rate over time.
actions.bp: A low-sodium diet, regular exercise, and stress reduction help normalise blood pressure.
actions.exercise: Start with 3× 30 minutes of moderate exercise per week — the impact is measurable within weeks.
actions.sleep: Keep consistent sleep times and avoid screens 1 hour before bed.
actions.smoking: Quitting smoking is the single most effective action for a younger biological age.
actions.alcohol: Reduce to a maximum of 1 drink per day — or eliminate alcohol entirely.
actions.diet: More vegetables, legumes, and whole grains — less sugar and ultra-processed food.
actions.stress: Breathing exercises, meditation, or regular sport help reduce chronic stress.
actions.social: Nurture regular social contacts — social engagement is an underrated longevity factor.
actions.bmi: Even 5–10% weight loss improves blood pressure, blood sugar, and inflammation markers.
actions.diabetes: Regular check-ups and lifestyle changes can significantly reduce diabetes impact on biological age.
actions.heart_disease: Cardiovascular risk management (blood pressure, cholesterol, exercise) is key.
actions.hypertension: Lowering blood pressure through medication and lifestyle protects heart and vessels.
actions.high_cholesterol: A Mediterranean diet and regular exercise effectively lower LDL cholesterol.
